name: Evil HERO Infernal Rider
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イービルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヘル・ライダー
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dark Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can banish this card and 4 other monsters from your GY; Set 1 "Super Polymerization" from your Deck, also you cannot Special Summon (except "HERO" monsters), but you can Fusion Summon monsters that must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion", using other cards' effects. These effects last until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use each effect of "Evil HERO Infernal Rider" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dark Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can banish this card and 4 other monsters from your GY; Set 1 "Super Polymerization" from your Deck, also you cannot Special Summon (except "HERO" monsters), but you can Fusion Summon monsters that must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion", using other cards' effects. These effects last until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use each effect of "Evil HERO Infernal Rider" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dark Fusion" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can banish this card and 4 other monsters from your GY; Set 1 "Super Polymerization" from your Deck, also you cannot Special Summon (except "HERO" monsters), but you can Fusion Summon monsters that must be Special Summoned with "Dark Fusion", using other cards' effects. These effects last until the end of your opponent's turn. You can only use each effect of "Evil HERO Infernal Rider" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
